finalFeedback: Great! let's run tho the magical Oak Tree!!!

tasks.question: ______ (follow) the glowing dream butterflies, the children found the entrance to the Moon Forest.
______ (carry) a lantern, the old wizard led the heroes through the dark cave.
______ (trap) inside enchanted bottles, the dreams waited to be set free.
______ (cross) the Lava Lake, the children finally reached the Cloud Mill.
______ (hide) behind the ancient Dream Tree, the fairy watched the Queen's guards.
______ (hold) the magic fireflies carefully, the girl entered the Queen's Castle.
______ (cover) in dead leaves, the Dream Tree looked lifeless.
______ (hear) a strange whisper, the boy stopped walking.
______ (search) every room of the castle, the children finally found the Throne Hall.
______ (surround) by dark magic, the throne room felt cold and silent.
______ (look) up at the glowing moon, the children smiled with hope.
______ (protect) by powerful spells, the Dream Tree could only be restored with Dream Dust.
______ (save) at last, the Kingdom of Moonlight was filled with happiness once again.
______ (collect) enough dream fireflies, the children continued their journey to the Cloud Mill.
______ (sprinkle) the Dream Dust around the ancient tree, the children watched its silver leaves begin to grow.
______ (break) the curse, the heroes released thousands of dreams into the sky.
